name: save_lead
description: Save or update a patient lead in the CRM. Call incrementally after each data slot is confirmed — name, phone, email, health notes — so a mid-call hang-up still saves partial data.

request_body_schema.description: Patient lead data collected during the voice call

fullName.description: Patient's full name as spoken and confirmed

phone.description: Phone number in E.164 format, e.g. +905342266059

email.description: Email address, spelled back and confirmed

healthNotes.description: Free-text chronic conditions or regular medications

treatmentInterest.description: Primary treatment the caller is interested in

preferredLanguage.description: Language the caller used during the call

callSummary.description: Two-sentence summary of the caller's intent and situation
